---
title: "Group"
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Current Students

#### *Graduate Students*

-   Weijian Huang (Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics, 2022-)

-   Heng Liu (Master in Statistics, 2023-)

-   Zhiyuan Jin (Master in Statistics, 2025-)

#### *Undergraduate Students*

-   Jieqiong Hu (School of Management, 2022-)

-   Chenyang Wang (School of Management, 2022-)

-   Yixuan Xu (School of Management, 2022-)

-   Yifan Zhao (School of the Gifted Young, 2023-)

-   Hanyu Zhang (School of Management, 2024-)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Former Students

#### 2025

-   Nuo Ding (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate in Biostatistics, Harvard University)

-   Jia Liu (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics, Pennsylvania State University)

-   Shucheng Liu (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill)

-   Feng Han

#### 2024

-   Jingyi Guo (*Current Position*: Ph.D. Candidate in Statistics, Pennsylvania State University)
